summary:
Hyaline membrane disease, or Respiratory Distress Syndrome, results from surfactant deficiency in prematures, causing alveolar collapse and impaired gas exchange due to elevated surface tension. This lung immaturity and subsequent pulmonary collapse lead to decreased functional residual capacity compared to closing volume, reflecting early alveolar closure and loss of lung stability.  

\boxed{A}
formatted_summary:
agent2 (Round 1 summarized): Hyaline membrane disease, or Respiratory Distress Syndrome, results from surfactant deficiency in prematures, causing alveolar collapse and impaired gas exchange due to elevated surface tension. This lung immaturity and subsequent pulmonary collapse lead to decreased functional residual capacity compared to closing volume, reflecting early alveolar closure and loss of lung stability.  

\boxed{A}. Answer choice: D
